title: RoflPack
body: A simple modpack for play with friends! We have "Create", and many addons on Create, Aether, Ice and fire, Terramity and more for adventures! We are have many mods for comfort play, like Xaero's Mini map, World map. For fight we have many Guns and Swords, Magic mods! We dont have any MAIN theme, don't have quests, because you can choose what you need!
